bugs.error_message: GET /api/insight/customer-radar/focus 500 (Internal Server Error) — NameError: name '_get_user_id' is not defined
bugs.root_cause: _get_user_id() called 9 times in the radar router section but never defined or imported. Other sections of the same file use _user['sub'] directly.
bugs.fix: Added `def _get_user_id(user: dict) -> int: return user['sub']` helper before the radar endpoints block.
